experience.label: Journey
experience.subtitle: Where I've worked and what I'm building now.

items.description: Building WhatsApp Concierge AI — a smart bot for small hospitality businesses that answers guests and automates reservations.
Hybrid reception + reservations role: check-in/check-out, managing bookings and direct guest relations.

work.description: Building websites and SaaS applications for local and international clients. Specialized in automation, AI bots, and web solutions for the hospitality industry.
Coordinated the reception team, managed reservations, check-in/check-out, guest relations, and optimized internal processes.
Operational role in reception — reservations, check-in/check-out, direct guest relations.

education.description: Real profile, specializing in mathematics and computer science.

projects.label: Recent Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of the projects I've been working on recently.

items.title: 3D Architectural Renders
items.description: Photorealistic 3D architectural visualizations of luxury villas and residences. From minimalist waterfront retreats to contemporary woodland homes — concept renders with blueprint overlays, floor plans, and walkthrough videos.

items.title: Hotel SaaS Suite
items.description: WhatsApp Concierge AI, Digital Compendium, Review Automator

items.title: SOL Restaurant
items.description: Modern website built for SOL Restaurant & Terrace in Bucharest. Features a sleek design with video backgrounds, interactive menus, and seamless reservation integration.

items.title: Le Bab Bucharest
items.description: Dynamic, vibrant website for Le Bab, a modern Middle Eastern restaurant and cocktail bar with multiple locations in Bucharest. Includes interactive menus and booking system.

items.title: Website Templates
items.description: Premium website templates designed for architecture studios and real estate agencies. Dark/gold aesthetics, featured project galleries, statistics sections, and responsive layouts crafted to showcase portfolios with maximum visual impact.

items.title: Terasa Florilor
items.description: Restaurant brand website with admin panel (Sep 2025). Custom-built website for a Bucharest restaurant brand. Includes a bold visual identity, full ordering flow with cart and checkout, multi-step pickup/delivery + cash/online payment options, event management with ticketing, and a custom admin panel for products, orders, events, comments, newsletter, and fiscal receipts. Built end-to-end as a freelance project: brand-aligned design, frontend development, custom backend, content management, hosting.

items.title: Law Firm Website — Secoșan N. Ovidiu
items.description: Style: dark/gold premium, bilingual RO/EN

items.title: MCP Audio Playground
items.description: Interactive Web Audio workspace using AI & Model Context Protocol. Features an 8-pad MPC drum machine, responsive audio visualizer, real-time audio manipulation, and dynamic keyboard playback. Build beats directly in the browser.

items.title: Darkroom — Projection Mapping
items.description: Immersive projection mapping installation with 5 themed rooms: Portal, Odyssey, Link, Alter Ego and Syntesys. Generative visuals created through the aestheticization of data — nature, man, space, computer and artificial intelligence — composed on a narrative of action-reaction. An 8-minute projection with over 14,000 frames, built end-to-end from concept to execution.

items.description: Online store with shopping cart, payments and an admin panel.

items.description: Analytics panel with real-time charts and exportable reports.

items.description: Blog platform with an article editor, categories and built-in SEO.

testimonials.label: What clients say
testimonials.subtitle: A few words from the partners and clients I've collaborated with.

items.quote: The WhatsApp bot fully automated our bookings. Guests get instant answers and we got rid of dozens of messages a day.
items.author: Andrei Popescu

items.quote: The SOL website exceeded all expectations. The sleek design and fast loading times boosted our online reservations by 40%.
items.author: Cristina Marinescu

items.quote: The 3D renders completely transformed how we present projects to clients. Each villa looks like a real photograph.
items.author: Mihai Constantinescu

items.quote: The Le Bab website came to life exactly as we imagined. Interactive menus and booking integration work flawlessly.
items.author: Denisa Vasilescu

items.quote: The hotel digital suite saved us hours of manual work. Reviews are now collected automatically.
items.author: Vlad Georgescu

items.quote: The Terasa Florilor platform with the full ordering flow, events and admin panel was delivered right on time. An excellent collaboration.
items.author: Elena Dumitru

items.quote: The architecture templates have incredible visual impact. We implemented them straight into our portfolio and clients are impressed.
items.author: Radu Stanescu

items.quote: The Darkroom projection mapping installation was the centrepiece of the exhibition. The generative visuals left the audience speechless.
items.author: Ioana Preda

items.quote: The law firm website looks extremely professional — the dark/gold aesthetics and RO/EN bilingualism brought us new clients from day one.
items.author: Ovidiu Secoșan

about.label: About me
about.subtitle: A brief introduction about me and what I build.
about.bio: I'm a developer based in Constanța, Romania, specialized in software for the hotel industry and AI automation. I combine hands-on hospitality experience with a passion for code to build tools that solve real problems.
